Module com.cuatrifasico.battleshi
Package com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.strategy

Class RandomHuntStrategy

java.lang.Object
com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.strategy.RandomHuntStrategy
All Implemented Interfaces:
IMachineShotStrategy, Serializable
public final class RandomHuntStrategy extends Object implements IMachineShotStrategy, Serializable
Machine shot strategy that combines a pure-random phase with a "hunt & target" phase:
  1. Random phase: when there is no active hit being pursued, the strategy picks a random cell that has not been shot at yet.
  2. Hunt phase: when the last shot was a CellState.HIT, the strategy enqueues the four orthogonal neighbors of that hit (filtering out out-of-bounds and already-shot cells) and then fires randomly among those candidates. If a candidate misses it is discarded and the next candidate is tried; if it hits, its own orthogonal neighbors are added to the queue as well. When the ship is finally sunk the queue is cleared and the strategy returns to the random phase.

This class implements Serializable so the entire machine state is preserved when the game is saved mid-match.

See Also:

      • Constant Field Values

    • ORTHO_DELTAS

      private static final int[][] ORTHO_DELTAS
      Orthogonal direction deltas: up, down, left, right.

    • huntQueue

      private final Deque<Coordinate> huntQueue
      Candidate cells to try while in hunt mode. Using an ArrayDeque gives O(1) add/poll at both ends and counts as one of the four required non-array data structures.

    • random

      private final Random random

  • Constructor Details

    • RandomHuntStrategy

      public RandomHuntStrategy()

  • Method Details

    • selectNextShot

      public Coordinate selectNextShot(Board targetBoard)
      Selects the next coordinate to fire at.

      If huntQueue is non-empty the strategy pops candidates from it (skipping any that have already been shot) until it finds one that is still valid, then fires there. If the queue is empty (or becomes empty after filtering) the strategy falls back to a random unshot cell.

      Specified by:
      selectNextShot in interface IMachineShotStrategy
      Parameters:
      targetBoard - The human player's board, consulted only to check which cells have already been shot at.
      Returns:
      The coordinate to fire at next; never null.

    • registerResult

      public void registerResult(Coordinate shotCoordinate, CellState result)
      Updates the hunt queue based on the outcome of the last shot.
      • CellState.HIT: the four orthogonal neighbors of shotCoordinate that are in-bounds and not yet shot are added to the queue, giving the strategy new candidates to pursue in the next turns.
      • CellState.SUNK: the hunt is over; the queue is cleared unconditionally so the strategy returns to random mode on the next call.
      • CellState.MISS: nothing changes; if the queue still has entries the hunt continues, otherwise random mode resumes naturally.
      Specified by:
      registerResult in interface IMachineShotStrategy
      Parameters:
      shotCoordinate - The coordinate that was just fired at.
      result - The resulting cell state.

    • enqueueNeighbors

      private void enqueueNeighbors(Coordinate center)
      Adds the orthogonal neighbors of center to the hunt queue. Neighbors that fall outside the board are filtered via Coordinate.neighbor(int, int)'s null-return contract. Already-queued duplicates are accepted (they will be silently skipped by the isAlreadyShot check in selectNextShot(com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.entities.Board)).
      Parameters:
      center - The coordinate whose neighbors should be enqueued.

    • pickRandomUnshot

      private Coordinate pickRandomUnshot(Board targetBoard)
      Collects every cell on the target board that has not been shot at, then returns one of them chosen uniformly at random.
      Parameters:
      targetBoard - The board to scan.
      Returns:
      A random unshot coordinate.
      Throws:
      IllegalStateException - If every cell on the board has already been shot at (should never happen in a valid game since the game ends when all ships are sunk first).
